boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Braze SDK initialization and user identification

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: SDK integration completed and data flow established
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: Braze SDK instance created with configuration and user identification, and data flush occurs to Braze servers
documented_first_success.official_milestone: Braze SDK integrated and initialized in the app, successfully sending user data to Braze servers.
documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The SDK initialization and user identification represent the minimal integration required to start collecting user data and enable messaging features, marking the first successful developer milestone.

assumed_prior_state: Developer has access to the Braze dashboard and API key
Developer has an existing app or website codebase
Developer has basic programming knowledge for their platform
entry_point.developer_intent: Integrate Braze SDK into an application to enable user data collection and messaging capabilities.

friction_gates.description: Must have a Braze account with API key to proceed with SDK integration.
Correct API key and endpoint must be configured in SDK initialization.
Valid user identifier must be provided to identify the user in Braze.
Network connection required to flush data to Braze servers.

prerequisites.requirement: Have a Braze account with access to the dashboard and API key.
Have an existing app or website codebase where the Braze SDK can be integrated.
Developer must have programming knowledge for the target platform (e.g., iOS, Android, Web).

details: Navigate to Braze developer documentation starting page
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Confusion or lack of access to account
primary_path.output: Understanding of onboarding steps and SDK overview
primary_path.success_signal: Developer is ready to integrate SDK

primary_path.action: Select and download appropriate Braze SDK for platform
details: Choose SDK from list (e.g., iOS Swift, Android, Web)
Download or add SDK dependency as per instructions
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Dependency resolution errors or missing SDK

primary_path.action: Initialize Braze SDK with configuration including API key and endpoint
details: Create Braze.Configuration instance with API key and endpoint

primary_path.action: Identify user by calling changeUser with user ID
details: Call braze.changeUser(userId: "user_id") to set current user
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Invalid user ID or SDK errors

primary_path.action: Trigger data flush to send cached data to Braze servers

evidence_supported: SDK integration is primary developer surface
Sample apps and repositories for testing
sources.title: Braze Developer Guide

alternatives_considered.name: REST API
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: The API is documented but the first-mile onboarding focuses on SDK integration for app or site data ingestion and messaging.

alternatives_considered.name: Dashboard UI
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: The dashboard is used for configuration and campaign management but initial developer onboarding centers on SDK integration.

surface.name: SDK integration
surface.selection_basis: The official documentation emphasizes SDK integration as the primary developer surface for first-mile onboarding, with detailed guides and code examples for multiple platforms.
